summary: The data center networking market presents opportunities due to rising demand for digital infrastructure and AI/ML solutions across sectors. Key growth drivers include high-performance technologies like SmartNICs and DPUs for scalable, energy-efficient networks, particularly in colocation and hyperscale data centers globally.
